name: Pathmark Local App Windows
label: Theme-matched tasklist cleanup
release_notes: Removes the misleading on-screen table preview and refines the PDF tasklist into a cleaner theme-matched Pathmark checklist with better nested support rows.
notes: Removed the misleading on-screen dataframe preview from the Tasklist tab; the selector is now only for choosing rows.
Tasklist PDF now uses the selected Pathmark accent theme for headings, rules, checkboxes, and support hierarchy.
Refined the printable tasklist header so Pathmark branding is present without dominating the page.
Reduced repeated parent/context wording in task row notes for a cleaner professional paper checklist.
Kept supporting time blocks nested by indenting the checkbox and task text together.
